what_it_does: Records metadata for a design-source image asset named recent-pitches/p-43.jpg in a channel-memory ledger.
observations: YAML frontmatter ledger entry for an image asset
Source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body text labels it as SOURCE design ground-truth
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image record
Image data is not inline; only a blob pointer is provided
Explicitly marked as SOURCE design ground-truth
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured asset metadata
Follows an image:// URI addressing scheme
Includes blob, mime, source, author_session, and created fields
File path mirrors the asset id with channel prefix
concerns: Width and height are zero, indicating unresolved or missing image dimensions
No links or relationships are provided
Actual image bytes are stored externally and not verifiable from this file
notes: A ledger stub for a design-source pitch image, carrying addressing, blob pointer, and provenance but no resolved dimensions.
questions: Why are the width and height values zero?
Where is the referenced blob actually stored and how is it retrieved?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record design ground-truth for an image; actual content is metadata-only with unresolved dimensions, consistent with a ledger stub.
intention_signals: To register a pitch image in the design-source channel so it can be addressed, retrieved via blob, and audited by author session and timestamp.
contribution: Provides a stable address, blob pointer, MIME type, and provenance record for a design-source image asset.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger entry for the design-source image recent-pitches/p-43.jpg containing its URI address, blob reference, MIME type, author session, and creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make retrievable a design pitch image as ground-truth source material.
